description: mathematics through symbols, unknowns, equations, and transformations
risk_if_overgeneralized: may hide domain assumptions and historical notation differences

description: mathematics of limits, functions, change, continuity, and approximation
risk_if_overgeneralized: may overprivilege modern rigor over earlier successful methods

description: mathematics through algorithms, simulation, complexity, and executable procedures
risk_if_overgeneralized: computation may be mistaken for proof or interpretation

description: mathematics as proof from definitions and assumptions
risk_if_overgeneralized: may erase non-Euclidean or non-propositional forms of justification
may mistake one figure for a general proof

description: mathematics encoded in formal systems and checked by machines
typical_representation: proof script, formal library, verification certificate
risk_if_overgeneralized: formal correctness can hide inadequate specifications or meanings

description: mathematics as repeatable method or algorithm
risk_if_overgeneralized: may be misread as lacking theory

description: mathematics as study of objects, relations, operations, and laws
typical_representation: groups, spaces, graphs, categories, formal systems
risk_if_overgeneralized: abstraction may detach from examples, history, and access
